SPIRE1REVAMPED-MARK_OF_PAIN.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Upon pickup, add [red]Pain[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MARK_OF_PAIN.title: Mark of Pain
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.flavor: [red]Floats using the power of friendship... and corpses.[/red]
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.title: Hovering Kite
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PROTOSTAR.description: Whenever you spend {singleStarIcon}, draw 1 card for each {singleStarIcon} spent.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-PROTOSTAR.title: Protostar
SPIRE1REVAMPED-UNHOLY_GRAIL.description: Whenever you play a card, [gold]Summon[,gold] equal to its {Energy:energyIcons()} cost.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-UNHOLY_GRAIL.title: Unholy Grail
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FROZEN_BATTERY.title: Frozen Battery
